brand.name: Quiver
brand.tagline: A crypto wallet built for everyone

hero.title: Crypto, in numbers you understand.
hero.subtitle: Always shown in your local currency. No blockchain knowledge required. 3 minutes to start.

f1.title: Always your local currency
f1.desc: See balances in TWD or USD — no mental math needed.

f2.title: Free transfers between users
f2.desc: Send money to friends with just an email — instant and free.

f3.title: We pay the gas fees
f3.desc: Withdraw to any wallet — we cover the on-chain fees.

login.title: Welcome back to Quiver
login.subtitle: Sign in with Google to manage your digital assets
login.termsNote: By signing in, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy

errors.oauth_failed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
errors.email_unverified: Your Google email is not verified.

dashboard.phaseNotice: Phase 2 — Complete identity verification (KYC) to unlock wallet features.

balance.title: Balance
balance.desc: Your spendable USDT (TRC20) balance. Pending deposits take ~1 minute to confirm.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage your devices, export your data, request account deletion.

security.sessionsDesc: Showing up to 50 recent logins. If you see an unfamiliar device, sign out of all others immediately.
security.confirmRevokeOthers:
Sign out all devices except this one?

Other devices will be immediately signed out and need to log in again.

account.title: Account
account.desc: Data export and account deletion (personal data law / GDPR).
account.exportDesc: Download a JSON file with your profile + transaction history (KYC photos excluded). Right granted by data protection law.
account.exportOk: Export started — your download should begin shortly.
account.exportFailed: Export failed, please try again later.
account.deleteDesc: After you request deletion, an admin reviews and verifies your balance is 0. For compliance, your transaction history is retained (but personal data is masked).
account.confirmDelete:
Confirm deletion request?

An admin will review. You can cancel any time before they finalize. Once finalized, this is irreversible.
account.deleteRequested: Deletion request submitted, pending admin review.
account.pendingNotice: Deletion requested at {date}, waiting for admin to process.

transfer.title: Send
transfer.desc: Transfer USDT to anyone by email. Internal transfers are free.

confirm.title: Confirm transfer
confirm.subtitle: This cannot be undone — double-check below.

transfer.twofaRequired: Enter your 6-digit 2FA code or 8-digit backup code

withdraw.title: Withdraw
withdraw.desc: Send USDT (TRC20) to an external Tron address. 1 USDT fee, on-chain gas paid by platform.

confirm.title: Confirm withdrawal
confirm.subtitle: This cannot be cancelled, please double-check.
confirm.largeNotice: Amounts ≥ 1000 USDT require admin review before broadcast

success.title: Withdrawal request created ✓
success.needsReview: Waiting for admin review before broadcast
success.needsReviewLarge: Large amount — waiting for admin review before broadcast
success.needsReviewVelocityCount: You've submitted multiple withdrawals in the past 24h — admin review required before broadcast
success.needsReviewVelocityAmount: Your 24h cumulative withdrawal amount is high — admin review required before broadcast

withdrawal.feePayerLow: Platform FEE_PAYER is temporarily low. Withdrawals are paused, please retry later.
withdrawal.twofaRequired: Enter your 6-digit 2FA code or 8-digit backup code
withdrawal.notInWhitelist: Whitelist-only mode is on. This address is not on your active whitelist.

wallet.title: My receive address
wallet.desc: Share this address or QR. USDT goes directly to your Quiver account.
wallet.hint: Only accepts USDT on the TRON network (TRC20). When withdrawing from an exchange, select TRC20.

notReady.title: Wallet not ready
notReady.desc: System setup is incomplete. Please contact admin.

kyc.title: Identity verification
kyc.subtitle: Complete verification to unlock withdrawals and transfers. All data is encrypted at rest.

step1.title: Basic info
step1.desc: Enter your legal name and ID number. Must match your document.

step2.title: ID photos
step2.desc: Upload front and back of your ID (jpg / png / webp, max 5MB).

step3.title: Selfie
step3.desc: Hold your ID and take a selfie. Both face and ID must be clearly visible.

step4.title: Review & submit
step4.desc: Once submitted, expect a response within 1 business day.
step4.notice: After submission, you can only edit data once your application is rejected by an admin.

approved.title: Identity verified
approved.subtitle: All Quiver features are now available.

pending.title: Under review
pending.subtitle: We've received your submission. You'll get an email once it's reviewed.

kyc.alreadySubmitted: You already have an active submission
kyc.fileFormatUnsupported: Unsupported format — use JPG / PNG / WebP

server.internalError: Something went wrong, please try again

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.invalidToken: Session expired, please sign in again

server.internalError: Something went wrong, please try again
